questionHtml: Describe how sigma (σ) and pi ( π ) bonds are formed.
markschemeHtml:
sigma (σ):

overlap «of atomic orbitals» along the axial/internuclear axis

OR

head-on/end-to-end overlap «of atomic orbitals»

 

pi ( π ):

overlap «of p-orbitals» above and below the internuclear axis

OR

sideways overlap «of p-orbitals»

 

Award marks for suitable diagrams.

 

[2 marks]

meta.title: Describe how sigma (σ) and pi ( π ) bonds are formed.
breadcrumbLabels: 14.1 Covalent bonding and electron domain and molecular geometries
